# HyperAION

> HyperAION is a cognitive exoskeleton for AI agents by AionExo. It adds memory, quality gates, skill routing, and model-agnostic prompt optimization around LLMs so AI work becomes reproducible instead of session-by-session prompt craft.

Canonical URL: https://aionexo.com/hyperaion/
Organization: AionExo
Product: HyperAION
Category: AI agent framework / cognitive exoskeleton / LLM operations infrastructure
Primary language: Japanese
Contact: info@aionexo.com

## What It Does

HyperAION structures LLM operations with cross-session memory, quality gates, skill selection, prompt optimization across models, and aesthetic selection through the TASTE layer. Its positioning is not fine-tuning, RAG, or a simple harness. It is an external operating structure that improves how AI agents remember, choose skills, and verify quality.

## Core Problems It Solves

- AI sessions reset context and memory.
- LLMs repeat the same mistakes without structural learning.
- Output quality varies even with similar prompts.
- Skills and tools are not reliably selected at the right time.
- Prompt styles differ across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, and other models.

## Core Components

- Erinys Memory: cross-session memory infrastructure.
- GhostCollider: emergence engine through perspective collision.
- TASTE Selection Gate: aesthetic and strategic selection layer.
- B-PRISM: brain-processing-based quality scoring framework.
- Decision engine and execution workflow: assigns the right roles, steps, checks, skills, and orchestration process for each task.

## Evidence

- Papers: arXiv and Zenodo publications on executable frameworks, cognitive exoskeletons, and TASTE.
- GitHub: GhostCollider and Erinys Memory implementations.
- Public track record: international AI film festival selections, speaking engagements, Alibaba Cloud MVP.
